meaning: test[医]曼托试验(或译芒图试验;一种测定结核菌素敏感性的皮内试验)
examples: The objective is to evaluate that the measures of the largest transverse diameter and of average diameter affect the results of Mantoux test.
Mantoux wedding, the bride would throw her bouquet to the unmarried female guests to the funeral.
Objective To evaluate that the measures of the largest transverse diameter and ofaverage diameter affect the results of Mantoux test.
